## Galaxy Digital's Novogratz warns AI is quietly commoditizing human labor, cites Palantir CEO's candor

No direct portfolio implication; thematic color on AI labor displacement from a prominent voice, with PLTR CEO's framing elevated as unusually honest — useful background for AI commoditization thesis discussions but not a trading signal.

- Mike Novogratz (Galaxy Digital) published an opinion warning that AI is commoditizing human roles broadly.
- He singled out the PLTR CEO's public commentary as the most candid assessment he has encountered on the topic.
- Coverage is opinion and thematic — no material business or financial data for PLTR is disclosed.
- Low classifier confidence; no actionable fundamental signal embedded in the headline.
